zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry De Audley於1175年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾李時，他的父親Sir Adam De Aldithley30歲，母親Emma FitzOrm30歲。他於1203年1月與Petronella De Gresley在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾李結婚。他於1233年住在英國斯塔福爾。他於1223年登記服兵役。他於1237年被列為custodian of chester and beeston castles。他去世於1246年11月19日在英國英格蘭素可貝斯泰德享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾艾比 爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry De Audley于1175年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾李时，他的父亲Sir Adam De Aldithley30岁，母亲Emma FitzOrm30岁。他于1203年1月与Petronella De Gresley在英国英格兰斯塔福爾李结婚。他于1233年住在英国斯塔福爾。他于1223年登记服兵役。他于1237年被列为custodian of chester and beeston castles。他去世于1246年11月19日在英国英格兰素可貝斯泰德享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾艾比 爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry De Audley was born in 1175, in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Adam De Aldithley, was 30 and his mother, Emma FitzOrm, was 30. He married Petronella De Gresley in January 1203, in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. He lived in Staffordshire, England in 1233. He registered for military service in 1223. In 1237, at the age of 62, his occupation is listed as custodian of chester and beeston castles. He died on 19 November 1246, in Bersted, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Abbey Hulton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry De Audley est né en 1175, à Leigh, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Adam De Aldithley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Emma FitzOrm, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Petronella De Gresley en janvier 1203, à Leigh, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a vécu à Staffordshire, Angleterre en 1233. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1223. En 1237, à l’âge de 62 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est custodian of chester and beeston castles. Il est décédé le 19 novembre 1246, à Bersted, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Abbey Hulton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry De Audley 1175 in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam De Aldithley 30 und seine Mutter Emma FitzOrm 30. Er hat im Januar 1203 in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Petronella De Gresley geheiratet. 1233 hat er in Staffordshire, England gelebt. Er hat sich 1223 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1237, als er 62 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als custodian of chester and beeston castles aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. November 1246 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Bersted, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Abbey Hulton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Audley è nato il nel 1175 nel Leigh, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Adam De Aldithley, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Emma FitzOrm, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Petronella De Gresley nel gennaio 1203, nel Leigh, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Vissuto a Staffordshire, England nel 1233. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1223. Nel 1237, all'età di 62 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come custodian of chester and beeston castles. Morì il 19 novembre 1246, nel Bersted, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbey Hulton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry De Audleyが1175年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアレイグで生まれた時，父Sir Adam De Aldithleyは30歳，母Emma FitzOrmは30歳であった。1203年1月にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアレイグでPetronella De Gresleyと結婚した。彼は1233年にはイギリススタフォードシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1223年に兵役登録をした。1237年，62歳の時，職業はcustodian of chester and beeston castlesと記録されている。彼は1246年11月19日にイギリスイギリススセックスバーステドで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアビー ハルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry De Audley(이)가 1175년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam De Aldithley(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma FitzOrm(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1203년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리에서 Petronella De Gresley(와)과 결혼했다. 1233년도에 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 살았다. 그는 1223년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1237년, 62세의 나이로 그의 직업은 custodian of chester and beeston castles이었다. 그는 1246년 11월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버스테드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 애브브이 훌턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Audley nasceu em 1175, em Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Adam De Aldithley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Emma FitzOrm, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Petronella De Gresley em janeiro de 1203, em Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele viveu em Staffordshire, Inglaterra em 1233. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1223. Em 1237, com 62 anos, sua profissão aparece como custodian of chester and beeston castles. Ele faleceu em 19 de novembro de 1246, em Bersted, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbey Hulton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry De Audley родился в 1175 г. в местности лиг, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Adam De Aldithley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma FitzOrm, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronella De Gresley январь 1203 г. в местности лиг, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он жил в местности стаффордшир, Англия в 1233 году. В 1223 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1237 году, в возрасте 62 лет, работал по профессии custodian of chester and beeston castles. Он умер 19 ноября 1246 г. в местности бирстед, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности эбби хултон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry De Audley nació en 1175, en Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Adam De Aldithley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Emma FitzOrm, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Petronella De Gresley en enero de 1203, en Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Vivió en Staffordshire, Inglaterra en 1233. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1223. En 1237, a la edad de 62 años, su ocupación registrada era custodian of chester and beeston castles. Murió el 19 de noviembre de 1246, en Bersted, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Abbey Hulton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
